title: Password Reset Policy
content: Users can reset their password using the forgot password page. If reset fails, escalate to IT support.

title: Invoice Schedule
content: Invoices are generated every Monday and sent to the registered billing email.

title: API Error Handling
content: API 500 errors should be escalated to engineering with request ID and timestamp.

title: Data Export Request
content: Data export requests must include date range, requester email, and business justification.

title: Account Lockout Policy
content: Accounts are locked after 5 failed login attempts within 15 minutes. Users must wait 30 minutes or contact IT support to unlock manually.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are processed within 7 business days after approval. Customers must submit a refund request through the billing portal.

title: Product Feature Overview
content: The reporting dashboard supports daily, weekly, and monthly views. Custom date ranges are available on the Pro plan and above.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Setup
content: Two-factor authentication can be enabled from Account Settings > Security. Supported methods are SMS and authenticator apps.

title: API Rate Limits
content: The public API allows 100 requests per minute per API key. Exceeding this limit returns a 429 error and requires a 60 second cooldown.

title: Support Ticket SLA
content: High priority tickets are responded to within 2 hours. Medium priority within 8 hours. Low priority within 24 hours.
